visa_types.name: Cultural and sports
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Cultural and sports > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Macedonia, Moldova, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine is CNY 276 (Euro 35).
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of the application at the Embassy or Consulate General of Slovakia, visa applications are processed within a period of up to 15 working days; in certain cases, processing may extend to 45 days. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe. If the intended departure date indicated in your visa application falls within 15 working days of the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application, you will be required to sign a disclaimer at the Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia for participating in sport and cultural events purpose can apply.
All applicants are required to submit their applications in person, regardless of whether their fingerprints were collected within the preceding 59 months. Children under the age of 12 are exempt from this requirement.
The visa applications for short-term stay visa (Schengen visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:Schengen visa-Overview]
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia for participating in sport and cultural events purpose can apply.
All applicants are required to submit their applications in person, regardless of whether their fingerprints were collected within the preceding 59 months. Children under the age of 12 are exempt from this requirement.
The visa applications for short-term stay visa (Schengen visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:Schengen visa-Overview]

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Cultural and sports > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Macedonia, Moldova, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine is CNY 276 (Euro 35).
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-colored background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.0 x 3.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of the application at the Embassy or Consulate General of Slovakia, visa applications are processed within a period of up to 15 working days; in certain cases, processing may extend to 45 days. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe. If the intended departure date indicated in your visa application falls within 15 working days of the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application, you will be required to sign a disclaimer at the Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
Application Form - English
Application Form - Slovak
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Employment
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here
For more information: https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en)
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Employment > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/Alipay/Wechat pay.
VFS Service charge:
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time:
The applicants are advised that the intended travel date specified in his/her National visa application falls within at least 30 days of the departure date and the processing time for the application will be no less than 30 days since the date when the documents are received by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe.
Applicants should be aware of the risk and accept full responsibility that it might not be possible to get the decision of visa application on time under the circumstances of late submission. Please note that the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing does not provide the service of expediting the processing of any visa application.

Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en).
The visa applications for long-term stay visa (National visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:National visa-Overview]
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en).
The visa applications for long-term stay visa (National visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:National visa-Overview]

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Employment > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/Alipay/Wechat pay.
VFS Service charge:
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
For more information: https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-colored background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 x 4.5 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.

## Processing Time
The applicants are advised that the intended travel date specified in his/her National visa application falls within at least 30 days of the departure date and the processing time for the application will be no less than 30 days since the date when the documents are received by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe.
Applicants should be aware of the risk and accept full responsibility that it might not be possible to get the decision of visa application on time under the circumstances of late submission. Please note that the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing does not provide the service of expediting the processing of any visa application.

## Download Forms

Application Form - Slovak
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa Based on Slovak Government Resolution No.269/2022 – Relocation, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en)
The visa applications for long-term stay visa (National visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:National visa-Overview]

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > bol > en > Table:National Visas Based on Slovak Government Resolution No. 269 2021 – Relocation > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/Alipay/Wechat pay.
VFS Service charge:
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
For more information : https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/peking-en)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-colored background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.0 x 3.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.

## Processing Time
The applicants are advised that the intended travel date specified in his/her National visa application falls within at least 30 days of the departure date and the processing time for the application will be no less than 30 days since the date when the documents are received by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe.
Applicants should be aware of the risk and accept full responsibility that it might not be possible to get the decision of visa application on time under the circumstances of late submission. Please note that the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing does not provide the service of expediting the processing of any visa application.

## Download Forms
Application Form - English
Application Form - Slovak
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Macedonia, Moldova, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine is CNY 276 (Euro 35).
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).
visa_types.processing_time:
From the date of receipt of the application at the Embassy or Consulate General of Slovakia, visa applications are processed within a period of no less than 15 days; in certain cases, processing may extend to 45 days. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe. If the intended departure date indicated in your visa application falls within 15 days of the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application, you will be required to sign a disclaimer at the Visa Application Centre.
Applicants should be aware of the risk and accept full responsibility that it might not be possible to get the decision of visa application on time under the circumstances of late submission. Please note that the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing does not provide the service of expediting the processing of any visa application.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of tourism can apply.
All applicants are required to submit their applications in person, regardless of whether their fingerprints were collected within the preceding 59 months. Children under the age of 12 are exempt from this requirement.
The visa applications for short-term stay visa (Schengen visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:Schengen visa-Overview]
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of tourism can apply.
All applicants are required to submit their applications in person, regardless of whether their fingerprints were collected within the preceding 59 months. Children under the age of 12 are exempt from this requirement.
The visa applications for short-term stay visa (Schengen visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:Schengen visa-Overview]

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Macedonia, Moldova, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine is CNY 276 (Euro 35).
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-colored background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.0 x 3.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of the application at the Embassy or Consulate General of Slovakia, visa applications are processed within a period of no less than 15 days; in certain cases, processing may extend to 45 days. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe. If the intended departure date indicated in your visa application falls within 15 days of the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application, you will be required to sign a disclaimer at the Visa Application Centre.
Applicants should be aware of the risk and accept full responsibility that it might not be possible to get the decision of visa application on time under the circumstances of late submission. Please note that the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Beijing does not provide the service of expediting the processing of any visa application.

## Download Forms
Application Form - English
Application Form - Slovak
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia for business purposes can apply.
All applicants are required to submit their applications in person, regardless of whether their fingerprints were collected within the preceding 59 months. Children under the age of 12 are exempt from this requirement.
The visa applications for short-term stay visa (Schengen visa) should be submitted based on your residence location:

[svk > chn > en > Table:Schengen visa-Overview]

## Visa Fees
The fee for the visa is due at the time the application is submitted and is not refundable. If you withdraw the application or it is rejected the fee will not be reimbursed.
The Slovakia representation reserves the right to adapt the amounts of the fees at any time in relation with exchange rate fluctuations.

[svk > chn > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
The visa fee is mandatory for all visa applications unless you are within the exemption categories.
- Short stay for children under six years of age
The visa fee for nationals from Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Macedonia, Moldova, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine is CNY 276 (Euro 35).
The service fee applies for each applicant (children and adults). Applicants shall pay a service fee (inclusive of tax) of CNY 236 (Euro 30).

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-colored background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.0 x 3.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of the application at the Embassy or Consulate General of Slovakia, visa applications are processed within a period of up to 15 working days; in certain cases, processing may extend to 45 days. The official processing timeline commences on the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application. Please note that the transit time from the Visa Application Centre to the Embassy or Consulate is not included in this timeframe. If the intended departure date indicated in your visa application falls within 15 working days of the date the Embassy or Consulate receives the application, you will be required to sign a disclaimer at the Visa Application Centre.
